top_signals.title: US Inflation Accelerates in May, While Core CPI Softens
top_signals.summary: US inflation accelerated in May with the Iran war pushing up energy prices, as the consumer price index climbed 4.2% from a year earlier, the most since early 2023. The core CPI, which excludes food and energy, increased 0.2% from April and 2.9% from a year earlier. Michael McKee breaks down the numbers on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin trims losses after core CPI rises less than feared 0.2% in May
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: DCC Inclined to Accept New £5.7 Billion Bid From KKR and ECP
top_signals.summary: DCC Plc said it was prepared to accept an improved offer from buyout firms KKR & Co. and Energy Capital Partners, which valued the firm at about £5.7 billion ($7.6 billion).
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CIBC to Offer SpaceX Access Through Canadian Depositary Receipt
top_signals.summary: Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce is set to offer Canadian investors access to SpaceX through a vehicle that gives local investors access to global stocks.

top_signals.title: Pope speaks Catalan in Barcelona, nodding to local identity on Spain tour - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Pope speaks Catalan in Barcelona, nodding to local identity on Spain tour  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
